name: Master List of Senior Citizens per Barangay
description: Comprehensive alphabetical listing of senior citizens grouped by their residential barangays. Standard report for LGU profiling.

name: Indigent Pension Beneficiary Master List
description: Master list of senior citizens eligible for DSWD Social Pension programs. Used for auditing cash disbursements.

name: Municipal Census and Demographic Summary Report
description: Statistical census detailing sex distribution, age bracket counts, civil status, and growth trend across Juban, Sorsogon.

name: Individual Senior Citizen Profiling Form (OSCA Form 1)
description: Detailed multi-page form containing full personal, biometrics, signature, and address data. Official record sheet for individual filing.
